title: Russia Advances Sweeping Crypto Bill With Provisions for 'Circumventing Sanctions'
message_html: Russia Advances Sweeping Crypto Bill With Provisions for 'Circumventing Sanctions' ...
snippet: The legislation would license crypto exchanges and permit cross-border cryptocurrency use while maintaining domestic payment restrictions.
